title: Schaum's Outline Data Structures Taxonomy
description: A hierarchical classification of fundamental data structures covered in Schaum's Outlines, showing their relationships and primary categories.
elements: Primitive Data Structures (int, float, char, pointer)
Linear Data Structures (Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues)
Abstract Data Types (List, Stack, Queue, Tree, Graph, Dictionary)
relationships: Primitive structures form the building blocks for Linear and Non-Linear structures
Linear and Non-Linear structures are implementations of Abstract Data Types
File Structures represent persistent storage formats for data organized by other structures
